result.markdown: --- title: "Week 12: Review" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## Tutorial exercises - Complete Exercises 1-7 from [Section 10.7 of the book](https://otexts.com/fpp3/dynamic-exercises.html). - [Tutorial learning objectives](tute-lo.qmd). ## What you will learn this week * Review Assignment 1 * Announce winner of the forecasting competition * Discuss exam ## Pre-seminar activities Catch up on any exercises not yet done # ```{r} # #| output: asis # show_slides(week) # ``` ## Post-class activities * Do any exercises not yet finished. * Complete past exams: [[2022](exams/Exam2022.pdf)] [[2023](exams/Exam2023.pdf)] [[2024](exams/Exam2024.pdf)] * Exam solutions: [[2022](exams/Exam2022_solutions.pdf)][[2023](exams/Exam2023_solutions.pdf)][[2024](exams/Exam2024_solutions.pdf)] * Re-read the textbook * Listen again to all lectures
